channel.title: I_Love_English on Mian's Blogs
channel.description: Recent content in I_Love_English on Mian's Blogs

item.title: Notes_Toefl
item.description: 3.1 听力：Official 01 Set 2 划词内容：Good. One other painting I really want you to look at is of a young woman surrounded by pumpkins. Q：be of可以这么用？ A：具有…性质,内容 划词内容：The woman’s nose is a little less than perfect and her hair is kind of messed up—This is realism. 笔记内容：a little less than 3.2 开始做，着手做 go about sth / go about doing sth get down to sth / get down to doing sth set about sth / set about doing sth set out on sth / set out to do sth up to a point 在一定程度上，有一点
